content.title: Regression in 4.15.5: E-matching over a fuel-recursive floating-point axiom times out on a trivial goal (unsat in 4.15.4)
content.excerpt:
# Regression in 4.15.5: E-matching over a fuel-recursive FP axiom times out on a trivial goal

**Summary.** A `check-sat` that returns `unsat` in milliseconds on **4.15.4** times out (default settings, no rlimit) on **4.15.5, 4.15.6, 4.15.7, 4.15.8, and 4.16.0**. The goal is trivial; the regression is specific to a quantified axiom whose body contains floating-point operations. The integer analogue is unaffected on every version.

**Repro** (29 lines, self-contained):

```smt2
(set-logic ALL)
(d
